You can also find a number of the brand’s other tool deals in the official Amazon storefront here.

items.title: CORSAIR’s FRAME 4500X bundle makes building an RGB gaming PC much cheaper at $125 (58% off)
items.summary: We just spotted a deal at Amazon that drops CORSAIR’s FRAME 4500X RS-R ARGB Bundle to $125 shipped. This is a regularly $300 package that includes the FRAME 4500X RS-R PC case, a Nautilus RS 360 AIO cooler, and an extra ARGB case fan – giving you a strong foundation for a new build. You’re looking at some serious value here, considering the case alone, complete with three ARGB fans, is currently selling for around $120. The AIO cooler and additional ARGB fan would run you another $115 when purchased separately, even with their current discounts. This bundle effectively gets you the liquid cooler and extra fan for about $5 more than the case by itself, making it too good to pass up for anyone planning a fresh PC build.

items.title: Velotric July 4th Sale offers Fold 1 Plus e-bike with SensorSwap back at $1,399 low, more from $999 with up to $812 savings
items.summary: Velotric has switched lanes from its Prime Day Sale to its 4th of July Sale, which is continuing many of the same deals with up to $812 savings on e-bikes. While I highly recommend the T1 ST Plus Urban e-bike bundle with a range extender battery (bumps range to 100 miles) for my city dwellers, another model I really love is the Fold 1 Plus Folding e-bike down at $1,399 shipped. Having been on the market since last year, it’s coming down from its full $1,499 price, which isn’t as regularly included in sales, though we’ve seen discounts mostly dropping the costs to either $1,449 or $1,399. You’re getting an extended time to score a $100 markdown here, giving you a more advanced (yet affordable) folding bike at the all-time lowest price we have tracked. Head below to check out the full lineup of deals while they’re still around through the holidays.

items.title: Amazon has enough satellites to launch its Starlink competitor
